language.title: Language
language.sync_failed: Language saved on this device, but failed to sync to your account. Other devices may show the previous language.

timezone.title: Viewing Timezone
timezone.hint: Used for dashboards, charts, and any 'today' label shown to you. It's a personal preference that applies across all your workspaces.
timezone.sync_failed: Failed to save your timezone preference.

account.profile_description_hint: Shared with agents working on your behalf — role, stack, preferences, anything you'd tell a new collaborator on day one.
account.profile_description_placeholder: e.g. Backend engineer (Go + Postgres). Prefer terse PRs and tests alongside the change.
account.profile_description_too_long: Profile is too long (max {{max}} characters; currently {{count}}).

notifications.title: Inbox Notifications
notifications.description: Control which events generate inbox notifications. Muted event types are silently filtered — you can still see them by visiting the issue directly.

assignments.label: Assignments
assignments.description: When you are assigned or unassigned from an issue

status_changes.label: Status changes
status_changes.description: When an issue you follow changes status (e.g. todo, in progress, done)

comments.label: Comments & Mentions
comments.description: New comments on issues you follow, or when someone @mentions you

updates.label: Priority & Due date
updates.description: When priority or due date changes on issues you follow

agent_activity.label: Agent activity
agent_activity.description: When an agent task completes or fails

system.title: System Notifications
system.description: Control native OS notification banners shown when Multica is in the background.
system.label: Show system notifications
system.hint: Show a banner from your operating system for new inbox items when the app isn't focused.

browser.label: Browser notifications
browser.hint: Allow this browser to show notification banners for new inbox items.
browser.granted: This browser can show notification banners.
browser.denied: Blocked by your browser. Enable notifications for this site in your browser settings.

tokens.title: API Tokens
tokens.description: Personal access tokens allow the CLI and external integrations to authenticate with your account.

revoke_dialog.title: Revoke token
revoke_dialog.description: This token will be permanently revoked and can no longer be used. This cannot be undone.

created_dialog.title: Token created
created_dialog.description: Copy your personal access token now. You won't be able to see it again.

workspace.click_logo_hint: Click the logo to upload a new image
workspace.description_placeholder: What does this workspace focus on?
workspace.context_placeholder: Background information and context for AI agents working in this workspace
workspace.prefix_confirm_description: All issues will be renumbered from {{oldPrefix}}-N to {{newPrefix}}-N. External references — pull request titles, branch names, links in docs and chat — that use {{oldPrefix}}-N will stop resolving.
workspace.manage_hint: Only admins and owners can update workspace settings.
workspace.leave_sole_owner: You're the only owner. Promote another member to owner first, or delete the workspace.
workspace.leave_sole_member: You're the only member. Delete the workspace to leave.
workspace.leave_confirm_description: Leave {{name}}? You will lose access until re-invited.
workspace.delete_description: Permanently delete this workspace and its data.

delete_workspace_dialog.title: Delete workspace
delete_workspace_dialog.description: This cannot be undone. All issues, agents, and data will be permanently removed.

labs.section_placeholder_description: Experimental settings will land here as they ship. Today this tab is intentionally empty.

github.page_description: Connect a GitHub App, control how Pull Requests show up inside Multica, and decide what your agents leave behind in commit history.
github.master_description_on: When off, every GitHub UI affordance is hidden and no new side-effects are written. Existing data is kept on the backend. Not a development team? Just turn it off here.
github.master_description_off: GitHub features are turned off. The PR sidebar, co-author trailer, and auto-link are paused. Data on the backend is not deleted.
github.connection_description_prefix: Link issues to pull requests automatically. When a PR with
github.connection_description_suffix: in its branch, title, or body is merged, the corresponding issue moves to
github.connect_disabled_tooltip: GitHub App is not configured on this server
github.disconnect_confirm_description: Multica will stop receiving webhooks for this installation. Existing PR mirrors and links are kept; reconnect any time to resume updates.
github.not_configured: GitHub integration is not configured for this deployment. Operators must set
github.read_only_hint: Read-only view. Only workspace admins and owners can connect or disconnect GitHub.
github.contact_admin_to_connect: GitHub is not connected for this workspace. Ask an admin or owner to set up the GitHub App.
github.toast_not_configured: GitHub integration is not configured for this deployment
github.feature_pr_sidebar_description: Show linked pull requests inside the issue detail sidebar.
github.feature_auto_link_description: Match PR titles, bodies, and branch names against issue identifiers and create the link automatically.
github.repositories_shortcut_label: Repository URLs live in the Repositories tab

lark.page_description: Connect each Multica Agent to a Lark (飞书) PersonalAgent Bot. Members can DM the Bot, @ it in groups, and type /issue to spin up a new Multica issue.
lark.not_enabled_description_suffix: on the server to enable Lark Bot installations.
lark.not_enabled_self_host_hint: Self-hosters: see the project README for details.
lark.preview_description: The at-rest key is set, but the Lark HTTP client is not wired in this build. The install entry point will appear here once the transport is enabled in a follow-up release.
lark.empty_description_prefix: Open an Agent in this workspace and click
lark.empty_description_suffix: to install a Bot for it.
lark.disconnect_confirm_description: The Bot will stop receiving Lark messages and the WebSocket connection will be torn down. The installation row is kept for audit; you can re-install later from the same Agent.
lark.agent_bot_manage_tooltip: Open this Bot's app page in Lark — manage scopes, edit display name, request additional permissions.
lark.agent_bot_manage_tooltip_feishu: Open this Bot's app page in Feishu — manage scopes, edit display name, request additional permissions.
lark.agent_bot_manage_tooltip_lark: Open this Bot's app page in Lark — manage scopes, edit display name, request additional permissions.
lark.agent_bot_disconnect_tooltip: Unbind this Lark Bot from the Agent. The Bot will stop receiving Lark messages.
lark.install_dialog_description: Open Lark on your phone and scan the code below to create a PersonalAgent Bot.
lark.install_dialog_description_for_agent: Open Lark on your phone and scan the code below to create a Bot for {{agent}}.
lark.install_dialog_description_feishu: Open Feishu on your phone and scan the code below to create a PersonalAgent Bot.
lark.install_dialog_description_lark: Open Lark on your phone and scan the code below to create a PersonalAgent Bot.
lark.install_dialog_description_for_agent_fei: Open Feishu on your phone and scan the code below to create a Bot for {{agent}}.
lark.install_dialog_description_for_agent_lar: Open Lark on your phone and scan the code below to create a Bot for {{agent}}.
lark.install_scan_hint: Lark → Scan → authorize the new PersonalAgent.
lark.install_open_link_fallback: Or tap here to open in Lark
lark.install_success: Install complete — your Bot is online.
lark.install_scan_hint_feishu: Feishu → Scan → authorize the new PersonalAgent.
lark.install_scan_hint_lark: Lark → Scan → authorize the new PersonalAgent.
lark.install_open_link_fallback_feishu: Or tap here to open in Feishu
lark.install_open_link_fallback_lark: Or tap here to open in Lark
lark.install_poll_retry: Network blip while checking install status — retrying.
lark.install_error_expired: QR expired before authorization. Scan again.
lark.install_error_protocol: Lark refused the install — try again.
lark.install_error_bot_info: Authorized, but Multica couldn't fetch the Bot's identity. Try again.
lark.install_error_conflict: Could not save the installation. Another bot may already be bound to this agent.
lark.install_error_installer_bind: Installed the bot, but could not bind your Lark identity. Try again or contact support.
lark.install_error_session_lost: Install session expired or was lost. Scan again to start over.
lark.install_error_forbidden: You no longer have permission to install Lark Bots in this workspace. Ask a workspace admin to continue.

repositories.description: Git repositories associated with this workspace. Agents use these to clone and work on code.
repositories.manage_hint: Only admins and owners can manage repositories.

updates.title: Updates
updates.description: The desktop app checks for new versions automatically once an hour and shortly after launch, downloading them in the background. You'll be prompted to restart once an update is ready.
updates.check_section_description: Trigger a check now instead of waiting for the next automatic poll. Available updates download in the background and show a restart prompt when ready.
updates.downloading: v{{version}} is downloading in the background — you'll be notified when it's ready to install.

members.revoke_invitation_description: Revoke the invitation to {{email}}? They will no longer be able to join this workspace.
members.remove_member_description: Remove {{name}} from {{workspace}}? They will lose access to this workspace.
members.cannot_demote_last_owner_title: Promote another member to owner first — a workspace must keep at least one owner.
